name: Cinnamon Chocolate Meringues
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Finely chopped pecans, toasted and cooled
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 275 degrees Fahrenheit. With an electric beater on low speed, whip the egg whites and vanilla extract until frothy. Increase the speed to medium and add the cream of tartar, whipping until it turns white and begins to stiffen. Gradually add the sugar, continuing to whip constantly, until the mixture is stiff and glossy. Sift the cocoa powder and cinnamon over the egg whites. Gently fold in the cocoa and pecans. Drop heaping tablespoons of batter, several inches apart, onto parchment-lined cookie sheets. Bake for 45 minutes. Turn off the oven and allow the cookies to cool in the turned-off oven with the door closed for 20 to 25 minutes. Store the cooled meringues in an airtight container. Yield: about 72 meringues
